# Lkotkote

> Lkotkote transforms bird sound recordings into climate and ecological insights by blending AI-powered bioacoustics with Traditional Ecological Knowledge (TEK).

Lkotkote pairs BirdNET-Analyzer species detection with Indigenous community knowledge and GBIF-ready biodiversity data, turning bird calls into seasonal and climate signals while respecting Indigenous data sovereignty.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Upload bird recordings and turn them into AI + TEK ecological insights.
- [Featured Sounds](/tek): Samburu Traditional Ecological Knowledge for featured bird species, with sounds and meanings.
- [About](/about): What Lkotkote does, how it works, and how to get in touch.
